title: Debugging Input or Output Value Processor

content.problemStatement:
The code given is trying to do the following
- Read the input from the input file `input.txt`
- Output to the file - `output.txt` stored in the same directory
- The output file should contain value that is twice the value of the original input file

Debug this code to solve the problem.
constraints:
- $1 \leq T \leq 10^3$
- $1 \leq N \leq 10^3$
- $1 \leq A_i \leq 10^9$
- The sum of $N$ over all testcases does not exceed $2\cdot 10^3$
content.inputFormat:
- The first line of input will contain a single integer $T$, denoting the number of user inputs.
- Each user input consists of 2 lines of input 
  - 1st line is the value 1 / 2 / 3 indicating `rollNumber`, `name` or `marks`
  - 2nd line has the `rollNumber`, `name` or `marks`
content.outputFormat: Output as space separated values on a single line - `rollNumber`, `name` or `marks`
